allow:
Bash(# Write and run Python inline via osascript
osascript << 'APPLESCRIPT'
set pyCode to "
import zlib, re

with open\('/Users/michaelmcclearn/Downloads/StayRate Elevator Pitch \(1\).pdf', 'rb'\) as f:
    data = f.read\(\)

streams = re.findall\(b'stream\\r\\n\(.*?\)\\r\\nendstream', data, re.DOTALL\)
streams2 = re.findall\(b'stream\\n\(.*?\)\\nendstream', data, re.DOTALL\)
all_streams = streams + streams2
print\(f'Found {len\(all_streams\)} streams'\)
texts = []
for i, s in enumerate\(all_streams\):
    try:
        d = zlib.decompress\(s\)
        decoded = d.decode\('latin-1', errors='replace'\)
        bt_blocks = re.findall\(r'BT\(.*?\)ET', decoded, re.DOTALL\)
        for block in bt_blocks:
            parts = re.findall\(r'\\\(\([^\)\\\\\\\\]*\)\\\)', block\)
            for p in parts:
                if p.strip\(\):
                    texts.append\(p\)
    except:
        pass

for t in texts:
    print\(t\)
"

set tmpFile to "/tmp/pdf_extract_stayrate.py"
do shell script "echo " & quoted form of pyCode & " > " & tmpFile
do shell script "/usr/bin/python3 " & tmpFile
APPLESCRIPT)

Bash(# Use osascript JXA to write file content via writeFile approach
osascript -l JavaScript << 'JSEOF'
var app = Application.currentApplication\(\);
app.includeStandardAdditions = true;

// Write the python script to a temp file
var pyScript = [
"import zlib, re",
"with open\('/Users/michaelmcclearn/Downloads/StayRate Elevator Pitch \(1\).pdf', 'rb'\) as f:",
"    data = f.read\(\)",
"all_streams = re.findall\(b'stream\\\\\\\\r?\\\\\\\\n\(.*?\)\\\\\\\\r?\\\\\\\\nendstream', data, re.DOTALL\)",
"texts = []",
"for s in all_streams:",
"    try:",
"        d = zlib.decompress\(s\)",
"        decoded = d.decode\('latin-1', errors='replace'\)",
"        bt_blocks = re.findall\(r'BT\(.*?\)ET', decoded, re.DOTALL\)",
"        for block in bt_blocks:",
"            parts = re.findall\(r'\\\\\\\\\(\([^\)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\]*\)\\\\\\\\\)', block\)",
"            for p in parts:",
"                if p.strip\(\): texts.append\(p\)",
"    except: pass",
"print\('\\\\\\\\n'.join\(texts\)\)"
].join\("\\n"\);

app.doShellScript\("printf '%s' " + ObjC.unwrap\($.NSString.stringWithString\(pyScript\)\) + " > /tmp/pdfex.py || true"\);
var result = app.doShellScript\("/usr/bin/python3 /tmp/pdfex.py 2>&1"\);
result;
JSEOF)
